scene_summary: A corporate meeting where a manager presents Q1 performance data showing missed targets and discusses whether to cut costs or push harder.

signature_lines: quick as we were effectively unable to reclaim the two lost days from February
observations.interpersonal_note: speaks in a flat, data-driven corporate tone; others respond with nervous agreement and suggestions
tries to lighten the mood with chill energy while others remain focused on the grim numbers

signature_lines: I think we're going to be fine
observations.interpersonal_note: offers optimistic reassurance that others dismiss with data-driven pushback
proposes drastic measures while others debate between cutting costs vs. pushing harder
offers alternative solution that gets dismissed in favor of cost-cutting
